markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 173. Intermunicipal Commuter Rail Districts
##### § 173.001 — Definition of Person

In this chapter:

    (1) “person” includes a corporation, as provided by Section 312.011 (Definitions) , Government Code; and

    (2) the definition of “person” assigned by Section 311.005 (General Definitions) , Government Code, does not apply.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: “person” includes a corporation, as provided by Section 312.011 (Definitions) , Government Code; and
the definition of “person” assigned by Section 311.005 (General Definitions) , Government Code, does not apply.
